name: mcp-external-sources
description: Catalog of user-added EXTERNAL MCP servers (kind: 'external') — the third-party counterpart to the shipped mcp-servers internal catalog. Owns the source definitions (CRUD + import of Claude/Cursor/Codex mcpServers configs) at /v1/mcp/sources/*, stored in the gitignored bridge/mcp-external-sources.json. mcp-client's readUpstreamRegistry() reads that file directly and merges external sources into the runnable registry, so they get lifecycle/supervisor/audience/aggregation for free. External sources default OFF until the user enables them.
